title: IEEE 802.15.4g and 802.15.4e Protocol Stack Enhancement
description: A layered diagram showing how IEEE 802.15.4g and 802.15.4e amend the original IEEE 802.15.4 standard to provide enhanced capabilities for Low-Rate Wireless Personal Area Networks (LR-WPANs) in IoT applications.
relationships: 802.15.4e replaces the original MAC layer to provide Time Slotted Channel Hopping (TSCH) and improved reliability
802.15.4g provides new PHY options for diverse IoT use cases (e.g., Smart Utility Networks)
Both amendments build upon and enhance the original 802.15.4 standard to form a complete, robust protocol stack for modern IoT networks
